title: The Legendary Brew
description: Use all the evidence to deduce the mixing results.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing6=R+ (ing6 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing1=G- (ing1+ing4=G-: both share G-), ing6=G+ (ing6 has G+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing1=B- (ing1 has B-), ing6=B+ (ing6+ing8=B+: both share B+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.

To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing8, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing8=R- (ing8 has R-)
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing4 and ing5, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing4=R+ (ing4 has R+), ing5=R- (ing5 has R-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing4=G- (ing1+ing4=G-: both share G-), ing5=G+ (ing5 has G+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing4=B+ (ing4 has B+), ing5=B+ (ing5 has B+)
      → SAME sign + → B+ resolves.
